document.source_title: IPL 2026: Rs 900 to Rs 2000, SRH management increase RCB match ticket prices match by 110%

claims.claim_text: SRH has increased ticket prices for the RCB match by 110%.
claims.evidence_text: the cheapest upper-tier stands that were previously booked at Rs 900 were raised to Rs 2,000, up by 110 per cent.

events.evidence_text: the Sunrisers Hyderabad-Royal Challengers Bengaluru fixture on May 22 is expected to be a crucial clash
